description: Governed contract registry for all public RPCs. Every RPC in expected_surface.json and execute_allowlist.json must have an entry here. Enforced by CI gate rpc-contract-registry (Build Route 10.6).

rpcs.name: create_deal_from_intake_v1
rpcs.notes: SECURITY DEFINER, EXECUTE to authenticated only (REVOKE anon, PUBLIC). p_fields jsonb: allowed top-level address, seller_*, optional nested property and assumptions (no client mao). require_min_role_v1(member); check_workspace_write_allowed_v1 (boolean). Creates deals row stage=new + deal_inputs assumptions snapshot; optional deal_properties. Internal helpers for validation/MAO merge with REVOKE ALL from app roles. 10.12C7: assumptions are canonicalized via _intake_canonicalize_pricing_assumptions_v1 (_parse_money_input_v1 for money strings; multiplier % and >1 divide-by-100); NULL canonicalize => VALIDATION_ERROR "Invalid monetary value in assumptions".

rpcs.name: create_deal_v1
rpcs.input_contract: CONTRACTS.md §54 create_deal_v1 (MAO server compute, Build Route 10.9)
rpcs.notes: Signature unchanged: (p_id uuid, p_calc_version int, p_assumptions jsonb). Server computes MAO = ROUND(arv * multiplier - repair_estimate - desired_profit) from required string fields in p_assumptions; overwrites assumptions.mao before persist — client-supplied mao ignored. Validates p_id, arv, repair_estimate, desired_profit, multiplier (strict non-negative numeric strings; multiplier in (0,1)). Workspace write lock via check_workspace_write_allowed_v1. OK data includes mao, id, tenant_id, assumptions_snapshot_id. VALIDATION_ERROR on bad/missing calc inputs. CONFLICT duplicate deal id. INTERNAL on unexpected SQL.

rpcs.name: create_share_token_v1
rpcs.notes: VALIDATION_ERROR on null/past/future>90d expires_at or null deal_id. NOT_FOUND on deal not in tenant. CONFLICT on cardinality limit (50 active tokens). **10.14B:** pgTAP in 10_14B_dispo_share_link_handoff.test.sql asserts OK path on Dispo deal for Build Route lane regression.

rpcs.name: foundation_log_activity_v1
rpcs.notes: SECURITY DEFINER. Called best-effort by other RPCs. Best-effort — caller catches exceptions.

rpcs.name: get_user_entitlements_v1
rpcs.notes: Schema governed by Build Route 10.3.

rpcs.name: list_deals_v1
rpcs.notes: Schema governed by Build Route 10.3. p_limit clamped [1,100] default 25.

rpcs.name: lookup_share_token_v1
rpcs.notes: NOT_FOUND returned for all failure cases (revoked, expired, nonexistent, bad format) — no existence leak. **10.14B:** same envelope asserted vs unknown token in 10_14B_dispo_share_link_handoff.test.sql (expired/revoked parity).

rpcs.name: revoke_share_token_v1
rpcs.notes: Idempotent. Revocation of already-revoked or nonexistent token returns OK. **10.14B:** pgTAP asserts revoke + post-revoke lookup envelope in 10_14B_dispo_share_link_handoff.test.sql.

rpcs.name: update_deal_v1
rpcs.notes: CONFLICT on row version mismatch or deal not found for tenant.

rpcs.name: resolve_form_slug_v1
rpcs.notes: Anon-callable per CONTRACTS.md §12 controlled exception. Resolves slug + form_type to tenant_id. NOT_FOUND for invalid slug, invalid form_type, or nonexistent slug — no existence leak between form types.

rpcs.name: submit_form_v1
rpcs.notes: Anon + authenticated EXECUTE (§12 / §64 / §66). SECURITY DEFINER. 10.12A: persists draft_deals + intake_submissions per tenant. 10.12C DROP+CREATE outcomes: seller inserts draft_deals with address-only from public intake — asking_price + repair_estimate forced NULL; buyer path calls internal upsert_buyer_from_intake_v1 and returns data.buyer_id; birddog inserts draft + intake only (no buyer upsert). 10.12C1: intake_submissions row stores draft_deals_id FK to created draft (1:1 partial unique index when set). OK data: draft_id, intake_id, buyer_id (buyer only, else null). NOT_AUTHORIZED when latest tenant_subscriptions missing, canceled, or current_period_end <= now().

rpcs.name: upsert_buyer_from_intake_v1
rpcs.notes: Internal SECURITY DEFINER helper — not app-callable. REVOKE ALL FROM PUBLIC, anon, authenticated. Signature (p_resolved_tenant uuid, p_payload jsonb) RETURNS uuid. Invoked only from submit_form_v1 on buyer submissions. Dedupe: lower-normalized email match first; phone fallback only when payload email absent; email present with no match inserts new intake_buyers row (no phone-only merge). Returns buyer id.

rpcs.name: list_intake_submissions_v1
rpcs.input_contract: CONTRACTS.md §64 list_intake_submissions_v1 (10.12C3 inbox filter; 10.12C4 unreviewed + review fields)
rpcs.notes: Authenticated only (REVOKE anon, PUBLIC). SECURITY DEFINER. Tenant from current_tenant_id(); NULL → NOT_AUTHORIZED. p_limit DEFAULT 25; coalesce null to 25; must satisfy 1 ≤ p_limit ≤ 100 else VALIDATION_ERROR. 10.12A base; 10.12C3 seller+birddog only; 10.12C4 filters review_status=unreviewed and adds review_status, review_outcome to each item. Ordered submitted_at DESC, id DESC. DIRECT intake_submissions SELECT/INSERT by authenticated remains forbidden (§64).

rpcs.name: list_buyers_v1
rpcs.notes: Authenticated only (REVOKE anon, PUBLIC). SECURITY DEFINER. Same limit and NOT_AUTHORIZED contract as list_intake_submissions_v1. Reads intake_buyers for tenant; items expose id, name, email, phone, areas_of_interest, budget_range, deal_type_tags, price_range_notes, notes, is_active, created_at, updated_at. Primary UI consumer: Dispo Buyer Ops (10.14C); Lead Intake must not use this as a roster.

rpcs.name: update_buyer_active_status_v1
rpcs.notes: Governed mutation for Dispo Buyer Ops activate/deactivate. Tenant-scoped. Does not modify list_buyers_v1.

rpcs.name: attach_deal_document_v1
rpcs.notes: Records governed document metadata after client uploads file to Supabase Storage. Allowed document_type: signed_purchase_agreement. storage_path validated against tenant/deal-scoped convention.

rpcs.name: list_deal_documents_v1
rpcs.notes: Returns document metadata for a deal. Metadata only -- no file contents returned.

rpcs.name: delete_deal_document_v1
rpcs.notes: Soft-deletes document metadata only. Storage file deletion is out of scope. deleted_at and deleted_by set on mutation.

rpcs.name: set_dispo_deal_milestone_v1
rpcs.notes: Sets or clears assignment_agreement_signed_at / earnest_money_received_at on dispo deals. Writes activity log on mutation.

rpcs.name: list_reminders_v1
rpcs.notes: Returns overdue and upcoming reminders for current tenant. completed_at IS NULL filter. items always array.

rpcs.name: create_reminder_v1
rpcs.notes: Min role: member. VALIDATION_ERROR on null deal_id, reminder_date, or reminder_type. NOT_FOUND if deal not in tenant. require_min_role_v1 exception caught and returned as JSON envelope.

rpcs.name: list_farm_areas_v1
rpcs.notes: Min role: admin. Returns all farm areas for caller tenant ordered by area_name.

rpcs.name: create_farm_area_v1
rpcs.notes: Min role: admin. VALIDATION_ERROR on blank area_name. CONFLICT on duplicate (tenant_id, area_name).

rpcs.name: delete_farm_area_v1
rpcs.notes: Min role: admin. NOT_FOUND if farm area does not exist for tenant. ON DELETE SET NULL cascades to deals.farm_area_id.

rpcs.name: accept_pending_invites_v1
rpcs.notes: Resolves all valid pending invites by exact email match. No parameters. Oldest-first. Partial acceptance. Silent per-invite failure. Sets current_tenant_id if NULL.

rpcs.name: accept_invite_v1
rpcs.notes: Consumes app invite token. Idempotent via accepted_at. Creates tenant_memberships row. Prerequisite for 10.8.8.

rpcs.name: current_tenant_id
rpcs.input_contract: CONTRACTS.md §28 -- internal helper, authenticated-executable for RLS evaluation only
rpcs.notes: Internal tenant resolution helper. Not a public-facing RPC. Granted to authenticated narrowly per QA ruling 2026-03-19 to support RLS policy evaluation. Not callable by anon or PUBLIC.

rpcs.name: create_tenant_v1
rpcs.notes: Creates new workspace and owner membership for authenticated user. Requires p_idempotency_key. Atomic idempotency via rpc_idempotency_log unique constraint. Same key returns stored result verbatim. Does not overwrite existing current_tenant_id.

rpcs.name: set_tenant_slug_v1
rpcs.notes: Min role: owner/admin. VALIDATION_ERROR on blank or invalid slug format. CONFLICT on duplicate slug (global uniqueness). One slug per tenant enforced via UNIQUE(tenant_id) + upsert. Tenant context from current_tenant_id() only.

rpcs.name: upsert_subscription_v1
rpcs.notes: Integration RPC only. Callable by service_role exclusively. Called by stripe-webhook Edge Function after signature verification. Upserts tenant_subscriptions on conflict tenant_id. Not app-user callable. Not in execute_allowlist.

rpcs.name: claim_trial_v1
rpcs.notes: No parameters. auth.uid() only. Atomically sets trial_claimed_at when eligible (has_used_trial false and no active 2h reservation). ok=true with trial_eligible true/false in data. Does not use current_tenant_id(); tenant_context_exempt in definer_allowlist.

rpcs.name: confirm_trial_v1
rpcs.notes: Integration RPC only. Callable by service_role exclusively. Called by stripe-webhook after upsert_subscription_v1 for customer.subscription.created with trialing. REVOKE authenticated. Sets has_used_trial and trial_started_at. Not in execute_allowlist. Tenant context exempt (definer_allowlist).

rpcs.name: check_slug_access_v1
rpcs.notes: Returns slug_taken, is_owner_or_admin, and tenant_id only when caller is owner/admin of that slug's tenant. No tenant_id leak when not authorized. No caller-supplied tenant_id.

rpcs.name: list_user_tenants_v1
rpcs.input_contract: No parameters. auth.uid() used as source of truth.
rpcs.notes: Returns all tenants the current user is a member of. Includes slug, role, and is_current flag. tenant_name is null (no name column on tenants table). No caller-supplied IDs.

rpcs.name: complete_reminder_v1
rpcs.notes: Min role: member. Requires non-NULL current_tenant_id() and auth.uid(); missing context → NOT_AUTHORIZED. On first completion: sets completed_at and appends reminder_completed row to deal_activity_log. Repeat completion: ok=true silent no-op, no duplicate activity row (idempotent). Cross-tenant call is no-op (tenant isolation enforced by WHERE clause).

rpcs.name: set_current_tenant_v1
rpcs.input_contract: p_tenant_id uuid — must be a tenant the caller is a member of
rpcs.notes: Updates user_profiles.current_tenant_id via upsert. Validates caller is a member of the target tenant. No caller-supplied user_id.

rpcs.name: get_profile_settings_v1
rpcs.notes: Returns the current user's profile settings. No caller-supplied user_id.

rpcs.name: update_display_name_v1
rpcs.input_contract: p_display_name text -- non-null and non-blank after trim
rpcs.notes: Updates user_profiles.display_name for auth.uid() only. No caller-supplied user_id. Returns saved display_name in standard envelope.

rpcs.name: get_workspace_settings_v1
rpcs.notes: Returns the current workspace settings. No caller-supplied tenant_id. Uses current_tenant_id() as source of truth.

rpcs.name: update_workspace_settings_v1
rpcs.notes: Updates workspace settings for current tenant. No caller-supplied tenant_id. Enforces admin role. Slug conflict returns CONFLICT without tenant_id leak.

rpcs.name: list_workspace_members_v1
rpcs.notes: Returns all members of current workspace. Min role: member. No caller-supplied tenant_id.

rpcs.name: invite_workspace_member_v1
rpcs.notes: Invites new member to current workspace. Min role: admin. Rejects duplicates and existing members.

rpcs.name: update_member_role_v1
rpcs.notes: Updates role of existing workspace member. Min role: admin. No caller-supplied tenant_id.

rpcs.name: remove_member_v1
rpcs.notes: Removes member from current workspace. Min role: admin. No caller-supplied tenant_id.

rpcs.name: list_pending_invites_v1
rpcs.notes: Returns all pending invites for current tenant. Min role: admin. No caller-supplied tenant_id.

rpcs.name: rescind_invite_v1
rpcs.notes: Rescinds a pending invite for current tenant. Min role: admin. No caller-supplied tenant_id.

rpcs.name: list_archived_workspaces_v1
rpcs.notes: No parameters. Returns archived workspaces where caller is owner; includes restore_token for restore_workspace_v1(uuid). Not JWT-tenant-scoped.

rpcs.name: restore_workspace_v1
rpcs.notes: Owner-only. Resolves tenants.restore_token to tenant; clears archived_at, subscription_lapsed_at, restore_token when subscription active. Supersedes 10.8.11O1 zero-parameter form.

rpcs.name: auth_user_exists_v1
rpcs.input_contract: p_email text — case-insensitive match against auth.users.email
rpcs.notes: SECURITY DEFINER. Callable by service_role only (REVOKE PUBLIC). Returns boolean (not JSON envelope). Existence only — no user data leakage. Used by send-invite-email Edge Function.

rpcs.name: get_acq_kpis_v1
rpcs.input_contract: CONTRACTS.md §55 Acquisition backend — get_acq_kpis_v1 (10.11A4 KPI date range)
rpcs.notes: Old zero-arg surface dropped. Signature get_acq_kpis_v1(p_date_from timestamptz DEFAULT NULL, p_date_to timestamptz DEFAULT NULL). Tenant from current_tenant_id(). Both params NULL = all-time; otherwise filters deals by created_at (inclusive bounds when set). p_date_to < p_date_from => VALIDATION_ERROR. avg_assignment_fee: latest deal_inputs row per deal (ORDER BY created_at DESC), averaged over qualifying terminal-stage deals in range. Read-only KPIs. STABLE.

rpcs.name: get_draft_deal_v1
rpcs.notes: Migration 20260509000001_10_12C6_get_draft_deal_read_path.sql. get_draft_deal_v1(p_draft_id uuid). STABLE SECURITY DEFINER; EXECUTE to authenticated only (REVOKE PUBLIC, anon). require_min_role_v1(member); failure => NOT_AUTHORIZED envelope. current_tenant_id() NULL => NOT_AUTHORIZED. Tenant-scoped SELECT on draft_deals; wrong tenant, missing row, or NULL p_draft_id => NOT_FOUND. No check_workspace_write_allowed_v1. OK data: id, form_type, payload, address, asking_price, repair_estimate, promoted_deal_id, created_at. Standard jsonb envelope ok/code/data/error.

rpcs.name: get_dispo_kpis_v1
rpcs.notes: Migration 20260515000001_10_14A_dispo_dashboard_read_path.sql. get_dispo_kpis_v1(p_date_from timestamptz DEFAULT NULL, p_date_to timestamptz DEFAULT NULL). STABLE SECURITY DEFINER; EXECUTE to authenticated only (REVOKE anon, PUBLIC). Inner BEGIN PERFORM require_min_role_v1('member'); EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS => NOT_AUTHORIZED (Not authorized). current_tenant_id() NULL => NOT_AUTHORIZED. v_from = COALESCE(p_date_from, now() - interval '30 days'), v_to = COALESCE(p_date_to, now()); v_to < v_from => VALIDATION_ERROR. OK data: deals_moved_to_tc (deal_activity_log handoff rows content 'Deal handed off to TC' in window), deposit_collected (deal_tc_checklist deposit_received completed_at in window), avg_assignment_fee (ROUND mean assignment_fee from assumptions_snapshot_id join for deals stage=dispo only, not windowed), date_from, date_to. JSON envelope (json). No workspace write lock (read-only).

rpcs.name: get_lead_intake_kpis_v1
rpcs.input_contract: CONTRACTS.md §64 get_lead_intake_kpis_v1 (10.12C2 Lead Intake KPI; 10.12C4 review outcome metrics; 10.12C5 unreviewed_count scope)
rpcs.notes: Migrations 20260505000002_10_12C2_lead_intake_kpis.sql (intro), 20260507000001_10_12C4_submission_review_outcomes.sql (KPI payload + semantics), 20260508000001_10_12C5_kpi_unreviewed_count_fix.sql (recreate only: unreviewed_count). DROP IF EXISTS + CREATE. STABLE SECURITY DEFINER; EXECUTE to authenticated only (REVOKE anon, PUBLIC). Signature (p_date_from timestamptz DEFAULT NULL, p_date_to timestamptz DEFAULT NULL). require_min_role_v1(member); wrapped NOT_AUTHORIZED. current_tenant_id() required. Effective bounds v_from = COALESCE(p_date_from, now() - interval '30 days'), v_to = COALESCE(p_date_to, now()); v_to < v_from => VALIDATION_ERROR. OK data (10.12C4): new_submissions, new_leads (excludes rejected_spam/test/invalid), rejected_count, submission_to_deal_pct (pct of new_leads promoted; draft.promoted_deal_id or review_outcome=promoted), avg_review_time_hours (review_status=reviewed, reviewed_at set), unreviewed_count (10.12C5: review_status=unreviewed AND form_type IN (seller,birddog); not windowed; buyer excluded), date_from, date_to. No check_workspace_write_allowed_v1.

rpcs.name: get_offer_payload_v1
rpcs.notes: Migration 20260513000003_10_13A_offer_data_contract_soft_offer.sql. get_offer_payload_v1(p_deal_id uuid). STABLE SECURITY DEFINER; EXECUTE to authenticated only (REVOKE PUBLIC, anon). require_min_role_v1(member); NOT_AUTHORIZED on guard failure or null tenant. Explicit-column SELECT on deals + deal_inputs (no SELECT *). NOT_FOUND missing deal or snapshot in tenant; NULL p_deal_id => VALIDATION_ERROR. Non-empty mao must parse numeric else VALIDATION_ERROR (invalid mao). Otherwise derives MAO when arv+repair_estimate+multiplier present; assignment_fee optional. OK jsonb envelope: data.pricing, data.seller, offer_clause_hours=48.

rpcs.name: refresh_deal_soft_offer_v1
rpcs.notes: Migration 20260513000003_10_13A_offer_data_contract_soft_offer.sql. refresh_deal_soft_offer_v1(p_deal_id uuid, p_idempotency_key text). VOLATILE SECURITY DEFINER; EXECUTE authenticated only. Order: require_min_role(member) first executable (wrapped NOT_AUTHORIZED); auth.uid() required; trim(p_idempotency_key) non-empty else VALIDATION_ERROR; SELECT rpc_idempotency_log replay before tenant/workspace/get_offer_payload/mutations; current_tenant_id(); check_workspace_write_allowed_v1; get_offer_payload_v1; builds copy_text/copy_email with 48h UTC clause (ASCII hyphen in Subject); INSERT rpc_idempotency_log ON CONFLICT replay; DELETE+INSERT deal_soft_offers. Failure from get_offer_payload returns envelope without log row.

rpcs.name: send_offer_v1
rpcs.notes: Migration 20260513000004_10_13B_offer_send_write_path.sql. send_offer_v1(p_deal_id uuid, p_idempotency_key text). VOLATILE SECURITY DEFINER; EXECUTE authenticated only. Order: require_min_role(member) first executable (wrapped NOT_AUTHORIZED); auth.uid(); trim(p_idempotency_key) non-empty else VALIDATION_ERROR; SELECT rpc_idempotency_log replay before tenant/workspace/deal lock; current_tenant_id(); check_workspace_write_allowed_v1; SELECT deals FOR UPDATE (tenant, deleted_at IS NULL); NOT_FOUND missing deal; CONFLICT if stage not analyzing or already offer_sent; VALIDATION_ERROR if no deal_soft_offers row for deal; INSERT rpc_idempotency_log ON CONFLICT RETURNING (xmax = 0) loser replay; winner UPDATE deals stage offer_sent row_version+1, INSERT deal_reminders offer_follow_up at clock_timestamp()+3 days, INSERT deal_activity_log stage_change. OK jsonb: deal_id, stage, deal_soft_offer_id, reminder_id, reminder_date UTC Z string.

rpcs.name: list_acq_deals_v1
rpcs.notes: p_filter text default all; p_farm_area_id uuid optional. Excludes dispo/tc/closed/dead. follow_ups uses deal_reminders due/overdue. STABLE.

rpcs.name: get_acq_deal_v1
rpcs.notes: p_deal_id uuid. Full Acquisition deal payload: deal row, optional deal_properties JSON, pricing from latest deal_inputs (returns mao and multiplier inside pricing object — 10.11A3). Returns last_contacted_at at top level of data, derived from most recent call_log note on deal_notes (10.11A3); null when no call_log exists. STABLE.

rpcs.name: update_seller_info_v1
rpcs.notes: Partial update on deals seller + next_action fields via COALESCE. Min role: member. Workspace write lock. NOT_FOUND cross-tenant or missing deal.

rpcs.name: update_property_info_v1
rpcs.notes: Upsert public.deal_properties by deal_id. Partial field merge via COALESCE on conflict. Workspace write lock.

rpcs.name: update_deal_properties_v1
rpcs.notes: Signature update_deal_properties_v1(p_deal_id uuid, p_fields jsonb). SECURITY DEFINER; GRANT EXECUTE to authenticated only. current_tenant_id() + auth.uid() required; else NOT_AUTHORIZED. check_workspace_write_allowed_v1 before write. Updates public.deal_properties only — no deal_inputs or assumptions. Jsonb patch semantics match update_deal_seller_v1 (§57): omitted key unchanged, explicit JSON null clears nullable field, value equals current => VALIDATION_ERROR, empty object / non-object / unknown key => VALIDATION_ERROR. Missing deal_properties row for deal in tenant => NOT_FOUND (no upsert). repair_estimate removed in 10.11A8 — use update_deal_pricing_v1 instead (corrective to 10.11A6). Allowed keys: property_type, beds, baths, sqft, lot_size, year_built, occupancy, deficiency_tags, condition_notes, garage_parking, basement_type, foundation_type, roof_age, furnace_age, ac_age, heating_type, cooling_type. beds/baths/sqft/garage_parking are text (v1 shorthand e.g. 3+1, 2+1, 2400/1200). deficiency_tags: explicit null clears, json array of strings valid, any other shape => VALIDATION_ERROR. year_built, roof_age, furnace_age, ac_age validated to safe typed values => VALIDATION_ERROR on bad input. Increments row_version and touches updated_at on successful change.

rpcs.name: update_deal_pricing_v1
rpcs.input_contract: CONTRACTS.md §59 update_deal_pricing_v1 (10.11A7 append-only path; 10.11A9 — pricing contract correction, corrective to 10.11A7)
rpcs.notes: Signature update_deal_pricing_v1(p_deal_id uuid, p_fields jsonb). SECURITY DEFINER; GRANT EXECUTE to authenticated only. 10.13E: first executable work is inner block PERFORM require_min_role_v1('member'); failures map to NOT_AUTHORIZED (Not authorized). Then current_tenant_id() + auth.uid(); missing either => NOT_AUTHORIZED. check_workspace_write_allowed_v1 before write. Corrective to 10.11A7 (build route 10.11A9). Allowed keys in p_fields: arv, ask_price, repair_estimate, assignment_fee, multiplier (numeric when set). mao is not writable — derived server-side after merge; p_fields ? mao => VALIDATION_ERROR. MAO formula on stored snapshot: (arv * multiplier) - repair_estimate - assignment_fee (assignment_fee treated as 0 when absent after merge). If arv, repair_estimate, or multiplier is missing after merge, mao is removed from the new assumptions snapshot; otherwise mao is set from the formula. Creates a new deal_inputs row only (append-only). Merges onto latest deal_inputs row; omitted key carries forward; explicit JSON null removes key from merged assumptions. 10.12C7: string values parsed via _parse_money_input_v1; multiplier trailing % stripped and values >1 divided by 100; blank/whitespace-only string clears key like JSON null. Updates deals.assumptions_snapshot_id and increments deals.row_version. 10.13E: on success inserts one deal_activity_log row (activity_type pricing_save, content Pricing saved, tenant_id, deal_id, created_by, created_at). Same merged snapshot as base before insert => VALIDATION_ERROR (no-op). Empty object, non-object p_fields, unknown keys, invalid numerics => VALIDATION_ERROR. Missing deal or no deal_inputs row => NOT_FOUND. Cross-tenant deal => NOT_FOUND.

rpcs.name: advance_deal_stage_v1
rpcs.notes: p_action: start_analysis | send_offer | mark_contract_signed. Valid transitions only. UC→dispo via handoff_to_dispo_v1. Workspace write lock. Requires non-NULL current_tenant_id() and auth.uid(); missing either → NOT_AUTHORIZED. Successful transition writes stage_change row to deal_activity_log.

rpcs.name: mark_deal_dead_v1
rpcs.notes: p_dead_reason required non-empty. Terminal dead stage. CONFLICT if already terminal. Workspace write lock.

rpcs.name: handoff_to_dispo_v1
rpcs.notes: under_contract only → dispo; sets assignee_user_id. Workspace write lock. Requires non-NULL current_tenant_id() and auth.uid(); missing either → NOT_AUTHORIZED. Successful handoff writes handoff row to deal_activity_log.

rpcs.name: handoff_to_tc_v1
rpcs.input_contract: CONTRACTS.md §55 / §62 / §71 / §72 handoff_to_tc_v1 (10.11A; activity log 10.14A; milestones + notification 10.14B)
rpcs.notes: dispo only → tc; sets assignee_user_id. **10.14A:** inner BEGIN PERFORM require_min_role_v1('member'); EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS => NOT_AUTHORIZED (Not authorized). Then current_tenant_id() + auth.uid() both required (NOT_AUTHORIZED if missing). check_workspace_write_allowed_v1 (read-only workspace => NOT_AUTHORIZED). Non-member assignee => VALIDATION_ERROR. **10.14B:** assignment_agreement_signed_at and earnest_money_received_at on deals must both be non-NULL before handoff; else CONFLICT with error.fields for missing milestones. Successful path UPDATE deals + INSERT deal_activity_log (activity_type handoff, content 'Deal handed off to TC', created_by auth.uid()); if p_assignee_user_id set, INSERT workspace_handoff_notifications (kind handoff_to_tc). Workspace write lock.

rpcs.name: return_to_acq_v1
rpcs.input_contract: CONTRACTS.md §55 Acquisition backend (10.11A) — return_to_acq_v1; activity log 10.14B §72
rpcs.notes: dispo → under_contract only. **10.14B:** inner BEGIN PERFORM require_min_role_v1('member'); EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS => NOT_AUTHORIZED. current_tenant_id() + auth.uid() required; check_workspace_write_allowed_v1 before write. Successful path UPDATE deals + INSERT deal_activity_log (activity_type handoff, content 'Deal returned to Acq from Dispo', created_by auth.uid()). Workspace write lock.

rpcs.name: return_to_dispo_v1
rpcs.notes: tc → dispo only. Workspace write lock.

rpcs.name: list_deal_media_v1
rpcs.notes: Lists deal_media rows for deal in tenant. STABLE.

rpcs.name: register_deal_media_v1
rpcs.notes: Post-upload metadata; p_storage_path unique per tenant. Workspace write lock.

rpcs.name: delete_deal_media_v1
rpcs.notes: Deletes metadata row; returns storage_path for Edge cleanup. Workspace write lock.

rpcs.name: create_deal_note_v1
rpcs.input_contract: CONTRACTS.md — create_deal_note_v1 (10.11A1); p_deal_id uuid, p_note_type text (note | call_log), p_content text
rpcs.notes: SECURITY DEFINER. Inserts deal_notes row; workspace write lock via check_workspace_write_allowed_v1. JSON envelope; ok data includes note_id.

rpcs.name: list_deal_notes_v1
rpcs.notes: STABLE SECURITY DEFINER. Returns notes array for deal in tenant (newest first).

rpcs.name: list_deal_activity_v1
rpcs.notes: STABLE SECURITY DEFINER. Returns activity array from deal_activity_log for deal in tenant (newest first).

rpcs.name: list_dispo_dashboard_deals_v1
rpcs.notes: Migration 20260515000001_10_14A_dispo_dashboard_read_path.sql. list_dispo_dashboard_deals_v1() no args. STABLE SECURITY DEFINER; EXECUTE authenticated only (REVOKE anon, PUBLIC). require_min_role_v1(member) wrapped NOT_AUTHORIZED. current_tenant_id() NULL => NOT_AUTHORIZED. OK data.items: deals where tenant_id match, deleted_at IS NULL, stage=dispo; each row includes share_link summary (active|none|revoked|expired|inactive), buyer_interest {schema_version:1, signals:[]}, activity teaser {entry_count, last_activity_type, last_activity_at}, latest arv/ask/assignment_fee from deal_inputs, health_color. JSON envelope (json). Read-only.

rpcs.name: update_deal_seller_v1
rpcs.notes: SECURITY DEFINER, grants authenticated. p_fields jsonb: seller_name, seller_phone, seller_email, seller_pain, seller_timeline, seller_notes. check_workspace_write_allowed_v1. Omit key = no change; explicit json null = clear; same as current = VALIDATION_ERROR; empty/non-object/unknown keys = VALIDATION_ERROR.

rpcs.name: update_deal_property_v1
rpcs.notes: SECURITY DEFINER, grants authenticated. p_fields jsonb: address, next_action, next_action_due (timestamptz). Same field contract as update_deal_seller_v1. check_workspace_write_allowed_v1.

rpcs.name: mark_submission_reviewed_v1
rpcs.input_contract: CONTRACTS.md §64 mark_submission_reviewed_v1 (10.12C4; 10.12C8 canonical signature + legacy overload)
rpcs.notes: SECURITY DEFINER, EXECUTE to authenticated only on both overloads (REVOKE anon, PUBLIC). Canonical (10.12C8 20260511000001): (p_outcome text, p_submission_id uuid DEFAULT NULL, p_draft_id uuid DEFAULT NULL). Legacy (plpgsql, PERFORM current_tenant_id for audit): (p_submission_id uuid, p_outcome text) delegates to canonical (p_outcome, p_submission_id, NULL). require_min_role_v1(member); current_tenant_id before check_workspace_write_allowed_v1 in canonical body. p_submission_id wins when both ids set; else draft_deals_id + tenant resolve; neither id VALIDATION_ERROR. Row fetch id AND tenant_id. Dismiss/reject outcomes only; promoted is promote_draft_deal_v1 + trigger trg_draft_deals_promoted_sync_intake_review. Idempotent OK when same outcome; CONFLICT when already reviewed with different outcome. buyer form_type rejected at validation.

rpcs.name: process_workspace_retention_v1
rpcs.input_contract: No parameters. Batch retention processor for subscription lapse, archive, and hard-delete windows.
rpcs.notes: SECURITY DEFINER. Callable by service_role exclusively (REVOKE PUBLIC, authenticated). JSON envelope ok/data/error. Invoked by retention-lifecycle Edge Function only — not app-user callable. Not in execute_allowlist.

rpcs.name: promote_draft_deal_v1
rpcs.notes: SECURITY DEFINER, EXECUTE to authenticated only (REVOKE anon, PUBLIC). (p_draft_id uuid, p_fields jsonb). require_min_role_v1(member); check_workspace_write_allowed_v1. Merges tenant draft + optional review overrides into new deals row; links draft.promoted_deal_id. On promoted_deal_id change, trigger trg_draft_deals_promoted_sync_intake_review sets intake reviewed_at / review_status / review_outcome=promoted; promote also issues legacy reviewed_at-only UPDATE on intake. CONFLICT when draft already promoted. NOT_FOUND when draft missing for tenant. Same field/assumption validation posture as create_deal_from_intake_v1 (no client mao). 10.12C7: birddog payload asking_price may be raw text merged into assumptions then full snapshot canonicalized (_intake_canonicalize_pricing_assumptions_v1) before validate/MAO; NULL canonicalize => VALIDATION_ERROR.

rpcs.name: update_dispo_packet_v1
rpcs.notes: SECURITY DEFINER; EXECUTE to authenticated only (REVOKE anon, PUBLIC). p_fields jsonb patch: omit=unchanged, null=clear, empty string=normalize to NULL for nullable fields. Stage guard: dispo/under_contract only; else CONFLICT. Envelope-safe numeric/date/URL validation (dispo_media_url must be https:// with valid host or empty/null). require_min_role_v1(member); check_workspace_write_allowed_v1. Writes deal_activity_log packet_update on success.

rpcs.name: lookup_share_token_public_v1
rpcs.notes: SECURITY DEFINER, STABLE; EXECUTE to anon AND authenticated (REVOKE PUBLIC). Public buyer-facing share token lookup. Token is authorization mechanism. No current_tenant_id() required. Resolution: validate format, hash, lookup share_tokens by token_hash, check revoked/expired, check workspace subscription from token row. Returns only allowlisted buyer-facing packet fields. No exact address, no seller/internal fields. Identical NOT_FOUND envelope for all failure cases (no existence leak).
